inlineContent.text: Several synchronization primitives introduced to aid in modern swift concurrency. The primitives are very similar to those used in other operating systems including mutexes, condition variables, shared/exclusive locks, and semaphores.

abstract.text: Several synchronization primitives introduced to aid in modern swift concurrency. The primitives are very similar to those used in other operating systems including mutexes, condition variables, shared/exclusive locks, and semaphores.
A result value indicating whether a task finished before a specified time.

Several synchronization primitives introduced to aid in modern swift concurrency. The primitives are very similar to those used in other operating systems including mutexes, condition variables, shared/exclusive locks, and semaphores.
An object that controls access to a resource across multiple task contexts through use of a traditional counting semaphore.
